title: Yijing Hexagram 24: Fu (Return)
description: Hexagram 24 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 24 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Return. Success. Going out and coming in without error. Friends come without blame. To and fro goes the way.
